node.constraint: Initialize Next.js app in the current directory non-interactively. Run: npx create-next-app@latest . --typescript --eslint --tailwind --app --no-src-dir --import-alias "@/*" --use-npm --yes && npm install better-sqlite3 && npm install --save-dev @types/better-sqlite3
Create a next.config.mjs configuration file that exports default nextConfig. Ensure experimental.allowedDevOrigins includes '127.0.0.1' and 'localhost' to prevent dev WebSocket HMR connection blocks.

Create a helper file at lib/db.ts that exports a single shared instance of better-sqlite3 Database opened at path.resolve(process.cwd(), 'shop.db'). Set a busyTimeout option of 5000ms on the connection config to avoid database locking.
Page contains a link with href="/products"
Page contains a link with href="/login"
Do not make any fetch or API calls to '/api/ram' or '/api/network/'. Only show static navigation links and hero banner.

Create a beautiful homepage styled with Tailwind CSS (clean dark/amazon-style theme). Include a header navbar with logo \'AmazonLite\', search input, cart icon link, a big hero banner. Add a sign-in indicator button linking to \'/login\'.
